sections.title: Talking to Thorodin again before talking to Donal

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: [Good day, sir/Good day, madam/Good day].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing down here?

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: We're extending the cave so more people can live in it.

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: These Miscellanians aren't so bad. They appreciate the benefits of living underground.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...such as?

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: You don't get rained on, for example.

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: Have you spoken to Donal?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet, no.

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: Well, if you want to hear stories about monsters, he's the best one to ask.

sections.title: After talking to Donal about the Giant Sea Snake

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: [Good day, sir/Good day, madam/Good day].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing down here?

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: We're extending the cave so more people can live in it.

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: These Miscellanians aren't so bad. They appreciate the benefits of living underground.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...such as?

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: Not getting rained on, for example.

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: Have you spoken to Donal?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have. The monster he talked about could be in the caves nearby.

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: You'd better get in there and do something about it, then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's not safe. I need to shore up the walls before I can go through.

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: [Good day, sir/Good day, madam/Good day].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing down here?

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: We're extending the cave so more people can live in it.

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: These Miscellanians aren't so bad. They appreciate the benefits of living underground.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...such as?

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: You don't get rained on, for example.

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: Of course, there are some problems, like the monsters Donal saw...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Someone saw a monster?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you tell me more? The King asked me to investigate.

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: One of the other dwarves who was working with us saw it. His name's Donal.

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: He went further into the caves to plan our excavations, and a while later he came out shaking.

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: He's been in the inn ever since.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good day.

sections.title: After killing the Giant Sea Snake

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: [Good day, sir/Good day, madam/Good day].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing down here?

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: We're extending the cave so more people can live in it.

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: These Miscellanians aren't so bad. They appreciate the benefits of living underground.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...such as?

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: Not getting rained on, for example.

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: Did you do anything about that monster Donal was talking about?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's been taken care of.

lines.speaker: Thorodin
lines.text: Glad to hear it. Now we can get on with excavating.
